positive: A stylized, minimalist graphic design centered on a stylized astronaut silhouette standing on a crescent moon. The astronaut is depicted with high-contrast, clean lines and glowing bioluminescent accents. The background is a deep indigo cosmic void featuring nebulous swirls of teal, sapphire, and violet. Emphasize clean edges, negative space, and a modern vaporwave aesthetic. The composition should be highly symmetrical and suitable for apparel printing, using flat colors and strong graphic contrast. Cinematic lighting, concept art, vectorized style, vibrant, ethereal.
